subject: Kagamine Len in a "Bad Boy" costume variant — blond anime figure in red-and-black geometric jacket with headphones
description: A young-presenting anime figure with short, spiky blond hair leans forward in a dynamic pose with one arm raised. They wear a bold red-and-black geometric jacket — a striking asymmetrical pattern across the torso — with headphones resting around their neck. The expression is confident and assertive, eyes forward. The background is predominantly dark with stylized neon or stage-lighting accents, suggesting a performance or music-video aesthetic. The overall composition centers the figure from mid-torso up.
foreground: blond anime figure in red-and-black jacket, arm raised, headphones around neck
background: dark background with neon-style stage accents
